name: chakra-ui-builder
tagline: Builds and sets up responsive, accessible Chakra UI v3 components, layouts, and themes for React/Next.js projects.
verdict: Solid dev-tool skill: clear setup steps for every framework, explicit output contract, good fallback/troubleshooting coverage, and worked examples for every required format. Docked for a very long run-on description, unpinned installs of well-known packages, no version/changelog signal, and no stated boundary against the sibling migrate/refactor skills it.

highlights.summary: `npm install @chakra-ui/react @emotion/react` (line 56) and other package managers install well-known packages with no version pin.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere; overlaps plausibly with chakra-ui-migrate and chakra-ui-refactor with no stated boundary.
description (lines 3-16) is ~988 chars, a single dense run-on paragraph of trigger phrases, well past sensible sizing.
